posts.altText: A macro shot of a sticker sheet with kiss-cut outlines and a glossy vinyl sheen.
posts.captionV1:
Die-cut vs kiss-cut — what's the difference? ✂️

Die-cut = cut all the way through to your shape. Kiss-cut = top layer only, easy peel on a backing sheet.

Kiss-cut = peel just the sticker, keep the backing. ✂️
A clean sheet that's easy to share and even easier to apply.
Small detail, big convenience.
